category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to Armenia (EAEU / EAC market).

title.en: China-to-Armenia LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入亚美尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入亞美尼亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Armenia's EAEU / Customs Union requirements: the EAC conformity mark under TR CU 004/2011 (Low Voltage), TR CU 020/2011 (EMC), and TR EAEU 037/2016 (restriction of hazardous substances in EEE, RoHS-style), on a GOST/IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 basis, versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与亚美尼亚 EAEU／关税同盟要求差距对照：依据 TR CU 004/2011（低压）、TR CU 020/2011（EMC）及 TR EAEU 037/2016（电气电子设备有害物质限制，RoHS 式）的 EAC 合格标志，基于 GOST/IEC 60598／62560／62471，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與亞美尼亞 EAEU／關稅同盟要求差距對照：依據 TR CU 004/2011（低壓）、TR CU 020/2011（EMC）及 TR EAEU 037/2016（電氣電子設備有害物質限制，RoHS 式）的 EAC 合格標誌，基於 GOST/IEC 60598／62560／62471，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited-body assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current EAEU Technical Regulations (TR CU / TR EAEU), applicable GOST and IEC standards, EAC conformity-assessment procedures, hazardous-substance restrictions, and in-country importer obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可机构评审、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行 EAEU 技术法规（TR CU／TR EAEU）、适用的 GOST 及 IEC 标准、EAC 合格评定程序、有害物质限制及进口国进口商义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可機構評審、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行 EAEU 技術法規（TR CU／TR EAEU）、適用的 GOST 及 IEC 標準、EAC 合格評定程序、有害物質限制及進口國進口商義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Armenia must place the product under the EAEU / Customs Union framework with the EAC conformity mark: electrical safety under TR CU 004/2011 (Low Voltage) on a GOST IEC 60598 / 60598-1 basis; electromagnetic compatibility under TR CU 020/2011 (EMC) on a GOST CISPR 15 basis; and restriction of hazardous substances under TR EAEU 037/2016 (RoHS-style, EAC-marked, with 10 restricted substances broadly mirroring EU RoHS). Conformity is demonstrated via a certificate or declaration of conformity issued through an accredited EAEU body, with a registered in-country importer; SARM (Armenia's standards body) administers the GOST/IEC standards base. Armenia's grid is 220/380 V, 50 Hz — a genuine match to China's 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal, so no voltage/frequency redesign is needed. None of these EAC obligations are covered by existing Chinese CCC certification, and the four EU-added RoHS phthalates fall in scope under TR EAEU 037/2016 even though they are not yet in China's GB/T 26572 mandatory list.
answer_first.zh: 出口亚美尼亚的中国 LED 灯具制造商须在 EAEU／关税同盟框架下投放产品并加贴 EAC 合格标志：依据 TR CU 004/2011（低压）满足电气安全，基于 GOST IEC 60598／60598-1；依据 TR CU 020/2011（EMC）满足电磁兼容，基于 GOST CISPR 15；并依据 TR EAEU 037/2016（RoHS 式，加贴 EAC 标志，限制 10 项物质，与欧盟 RoHS 大致一致）满足有害物质限制。合格性通过 EAEU 认可机构出具的合格证书或符合性声明证明，并须有注册的进口国进口商；SARM（亚美尼亚标准机构）管理 GOST/IEC 标准基础。亚美尼亚电网为 220/380 V、50 Hz——与中国 220/380 V 50 Hz 标称值真正匹配，故无需电压／频率改设计。上述 EAC 义务均不被现有中国 CCC 认证所涵盖；欧盟新增的 4 项 RoHS 邻苯二甲酸酯虽尚未纳入中国 GB/T 26572 强制清单，但在 TR EAEU 037/2016 下属适用范围。
answer_first.zht: 出口亞美尼亞的中國 LED 燈具製造商須在 EAEU／關稅同盟框架下投放產品並加貼 EAC 合格標誌：依據 TR CU 004/2011（低壓）滿足電氣安全，基於 GOST IEC 60598／60598-1；依據 TR CU 020/2011（EMC）滿足電磁兼容，基於 GOST CISPR 15；並依據 TR EAEU 037/2016（RoHS 式，加貼 EAC 標誌，限制 10 項物質，與歐盟 RoHS 大致一致）滿足有害物質限制。合格性通過 EAEU 認可機構出具的合格證書或符合性聲明證明，並須有註冊的進口國進口商；SARM（亞美尼亞標準機構）管理 GOST/IEC 標準基礎。亞美尼亞電網為 220/380 V、50 Hz——與中國 220/380 V 50 Hz 標稱值真正匹配，故無需電壓／頻率改設計。上述 EAC 義務均不被現有中國 CCC 認證所涵蓋；歐盟新增的 4 項 RoHS 鄰苯二甲酸酯雖尚未納入中國 GB/T 26572 強制清單，但在 TR EAEU 037/2016 下屬適用範圍。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or on any EAEU Technical Regulation amendment (TR CU 004 / TR CU 020 / TR EAEU 037) or referenced GOST/IEC standard revision.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. EAC conformity-assessment scheme references, TR EAEU 037/2016 restricted-substance list, and the GOST/IEC standards basis must be re-verified against the current EAEU register on each review cycle.
